abstract: A methodology for managing dependencies, coupling, and abstraction so that vibe-coded software stays modifiable and AI-ownable as it grows. Modification-resistant code is isolated by responsibility, so each part can change without rippling into others — achieved by minimizing dependencies and keeping them one-directional. The reasoning is portable: classify the problem's understandability via Cynefin, choose a matching coupling strength, enforce one-way dependency, and keep abstraction consistent.
